headlines.title: Chris Mason: What the results tell us so far
headlines.description: So far, we have a chunk of the results around the parts of England that have had contests and no results yet from Scotland or Wales.

headlines.title: What early election results show us in maps and charts
headlines.description: See which parties are winning - and losing – across the UK and who’s won in your area, using our interactive tool.

headlines.title: John Curtice: First results shows how fragmented UK politics has become
headlines.description: Reform are the winners so far, with more results still to be declared.

headlines.title: When will we know the full results?
headlines.description: Millions have voted in parliamentary elections in Scotland and Wales, and local elections in England.

headlines.title: Quiz: Which facial feature almost stopped Attenborough's TV career?
headlines.description: Sir David Attenborough turns 100. How well do you know the broadcaster's life and career?

headlines.title: David Attenborough says he is 'overwhelmed' by 100th birthday messages
headlines.description: The legendary wildlife broadcaster thanks fans in a message the day before he reaches his centenary.

headlines.title: Third British national has suspected hantavirus infection, government says
headlines.description: The patient is on the remote Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha, which was visited by the cruise ship in April.

headlines.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.

headlines.title: South East Water boss quits after thousands of homes left without water
headlines.description: David Hinton faced criticism after outages affected tens of thousands of people in Kent and Sussex.

headlines.title: Celebrities send well wishes to Bonnie Tyler as singer in induced coma after surgery
headlines.description: The Total Eclipse of the Heart singer was rushed to hospital for emergency surgery in Portugal on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Man charged after allegedly threatening Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor
headlines.description: Alex Jenkinson, 39, of Stowmarket, Suffolk, has been remanded in custody ahead of a court appearance.

headlines.title: English clubs reach all three European finals for first time
headlines.description: English teams have reached the finals of three different European competitions in the same season for the first time.

headlines.title: The companies making billions from the Iran war
headlines.description: Through surging profits or soaring share prices, the war has been a boon for some firms.

headlines.title: Live from your living room: The rise of concert films and livestreamed gigs
headlines.description: Can't see your favourite act in the flesh? There might be a solution - but not everyone's a fan.

headlines.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
headlines.description: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Official exposed as Chinese spy' and 'Time for Starmer to stand aside'
headlines.description: Several of the papers report that a Home Office official has been found guilty of working for Chinese intelligence.

headlines.title: Weekly quiz: Who was this mystery masked star at the Met Gala?
headlines.description: How much attention did you pay to what happened in the world over the past seven days?

headlines.title: Hantavirus survivor says sickness was like 'hell on earth'
headlines.description: Two survivors who caught the hantavirus years earlier told the BBC they both felt lucky to be alive.

headlines.title: Anti-war protests rock Japan as PM pushes for stronger defence
headlines.description: Japan's largest anti-war protests in decades highlight a population divided over changes to its pacifist constitution.

headlines.title: Rebel Wilson accused of 'complete revision of history' as defamation case closes
headlines.description: The Bridesmaids star claims an actress retracted a complaint about sexual harassment by a producer.

headlines.title: Woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
headlines.description: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".

headlines.title: Football club owners charged with human trafficking
headlines.description: Barrie Drewitt-Barlow and husband Scott are accused of sexual exploitation and rape.

headlines.title: Five killed in huge fire at packed Mexico fairground
headlines.description: The blaze in the south-eastern city of Villahermosa erupted during a concert reportedly attended by some 135,000 people.

headlines.title: Crowds cheer China's new snooker star on return from championship win
headlines.description: Wu Yize, 22, receives a rock star's welcome after becoming second-youngest player to win a world title.

headlines.title: Home baker shuts cake shed over 'ridiculous' rules
headlines.description: Natalie Brook, 37, says she has stopped selling cakes from her garden over street trading rules.

headlines.title: US to revoke passports of parents with child support debt
headlines.description: Parents who have outstanding debt of more than $2,500 (€1,844) in child support payments could be impacted.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Electioncast: It’s Time To Vote!
headlines.description: Adam, Laura, Chris, James and Felicity bring you one last update before the polls open.

headlines.title: Is Donald Trump close to finishing his war with Iran?
headlines.description: Or has the US president lost control?

headlines.title: Paul McCartney’s 'lost bass’ and its remarkable return after 51 years
headlines.description: The story of Paul McCartney’s original Höfner bass and the fan-powered quest to find it.

headlines.title: Vibrant and victorious - Villa ready to end 30-year trophy drought
headlines.description: When Unai Emery arrived at Aston Villa he declared he wanted to win trophies. He is now just a game away from silverware after a crushing Europa League semi-final win against Nottingham Forest.

headlines.title: Glasner's long Palace goodbye sets up 'perfect' finale
headlines.description: Crystal Palace desperately did not want to be in the Conference League - now they are one game from winning it and creating more club history and a "perfect" finale for boss Oliver Glasner.

headlines.title: Littler beats Humphries for record-equalling win
headlines.description: Luke Littler beats Luke Humphries to claim a third successive night win and a record-equalling sixth in this season's Premier League.

headlines.title: Sutton's predictions v boxing world champion Fabio Wardley
headlines.description: Chris Sutton takes on world champion boxer Fabio Wardley plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's fixtures.

headlines.title: Why Spurs fans face Arsenal dilemma
headlines.description: Why Sunday's Premier League game between West Ham and Arsenal could be viewed as a nightmare for Tottenham - whatever the result.

headlines.title: 'Like getting the vicar to swear' – Dubois finding his voice
headlines.description: Frank Warren writes in his BBC Sport column about how hard it is to promote both Fabio Wardley and Daniel Dubois for their heavyweight world title fight.

headlines.title: England's Kemp never considered future during injury woe
headlines.description: England all-rounder Freya Kemp says she did not consider retirement or continuing her career solely as a batter during her recent injury woes.
